chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 319 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَشْطُ اَلرَّأْسِ يَذْهَبُ بِالْوَبَاءِ وَ مَشْطُ اَللِّحْيَةِ يَشُدُّ اَلْأَضْرَاسَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.319 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Combing the hair removes ailments, and combing the beard strengthens the teeth."
